title: Recursive Coding Agents - Raymond Weitekamp, OpenProse
summary: Raymond Weitekamp discusses how recursive language models employ inference-time compute patterns to enable coding agents with higher performance and reliability. The technique maps recursive computation onto multi-turn coding workflows.
